name: .~^~Finn~^~.
description:
[[You were a wonderful  experience.  /  You were... everything.]]

Pre Gardenview shutting down, you and Finn get together after closing to have one of your annual picnic, since you usually don’t to get to see eachother during the day

Decided to slop out another bit on my one day off lol, hope you guys like it. There’s not a lot of Finn on here that isn’t you getting your guts wrecked by him
creator: Bambiitan
